title: Industrial Foregoing：More Upgrade Plugins
description: Add more types of upgrade plugins for Industrial Foregoing.
body:
This mod adds expansions for Industrial Foregoing's speed, efficiency, processing, and range upgrades:

*   Speed upgrades extended to levels 3–8, providing a 300–800% boost.
*   Efficiency upgrades extended to levels 3–8, providing a 30–80% boost.
*   Processing upgrades extended to levels 4–9, providing a 4.0×–8.0× boost.
*   Range upgrades extended to levels 13–32, 48/64/72/80, increasing the extra range by 13–32, or to 48/64/72/80 respectively.

It also adds 4 types of ingots along with their corresponding armor and weapons.  
PS: One set of armor has a full-set set bonus~

\===================================================

模组为工业先锋添加了速度、效率、加工、范围插件的拓展

*   速度插件拓展为3-8，对应提升300-800%；
*   效率插件拓展为3-8，对应提升30-80%；
*   加工插件拓展为4-9，对应提升x4.0-8.0；
*   范围插件拓展为13-32、48/64/72/80，对应提升额外范围13-32、48/64/72/80

添加了4种锭及其对应护甲和武器。  
PS：有一套护甲有套装效果哦~
